security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.remiolauncher.com https://remiolauncher.com https://orbit-launcher-production.up.railway.app https://accounts.google.com https://cdn.simpleicons.org https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://cdn.simpleicons.org https://lh3.googleusercontent.com blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Track, manage, and launch all your subscriptions and tools in one place.
bundle.longDescription: Remio helps you organize your digital subscriptions and app ecosystem. Track renewal dates, monitor activity, and launch your tools — all from one beautiful dashboard.
